title: Map Printer (Forge)
description: Save maps to images (client side) - now on Forge
body:
A Forge version of [Map Printer](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-printer) by [Jrm_Wrm](https://github.com/JrmWrm). 

<hr>

### What does it do?

Save in-game maps to images in your minecraft directory. Printing a map can be done by pressing **M** while holding a filled map. This key can be changed in the controls options.

### Where does it save them?

In the same folder where you also find your saves and mods folder, you will find a maps folder which contains all the maps you print.

### Does it work on servers?

Yes! You only need to have the mod installed on your computer and it will work on any server.

### Is that all?

Yup
